hypothesis: Systems-optimizer recovery becomes safer if any non-null active_hypothesis must resolve to a matching seeded hypothesis-card artifact, so interrupted slices cannot resume from state/backlog pointers alone.
measurement: Before the ratchet, `node CLAW/scripts/verify-systems-optimizer.mjs` enforced active_hypothesis alignment only against backlog, so a non-null active_hypothesis could still point at no hypothesis card or a drifted seeded card artifact and verify clean. After the ratchet, the verifier rejects any non-null active_hypothesis that lacks `CLAW/control-plane/system-optimizer/hypotheses/<id>.json`, is not `seeded`, or drifts from that card across the bounded contract fields, while the fixed scope-local promotion bundle stays green.
keep_rule: Keep only if active systems-optimizer state must resolve to a matching seeded hypothesis-card artifact and the fixed scope-local evaluation bundle passes without touching route implementation paths.
learning_item: Active systems-optimizer slices need replayable seeded hypothesis-card artifacts; backlog alignment alone leaves interrupted recovery exposed to missing or drifted card files.
